claims.claim: Homepage publicly accessible and value proposition clearly stated
claims.evidence: Prompt, run, and deploy AI agents in seconds

claims.claim: Pricing page discoverable in 2 clicks from homepage
claims.evidence: "Pricing" is listed as a link on the homepage.

claims.claim: Documentation or live demo accessible without login
claims.evidence: "MCP demo" and "SDK playground" are accessible without login.

claims.claim: Integration list or supported frameworks documented
claims.evidence: Pipedream Connect provides the end-to-end developer toolkit to add any integration to your app or agent in minutes.

claims.claim: Authentication / data handling claims publicly stated
claims.evidence: Pipedream puts security and privacy at the core of its architecture. With certifications like SOC 2 Type II, HIPAA, and full GDPR compliance, it’s built to meet the demands of modern development teams handling sensitive data.
